nasb.text: “While so engaged as I was journeying to Damascus with the authority and commission of the chief priests,

esv.text: “In this connection I journeyed to Damascus with the authority and commission of the chief priests.

cnv.text: “那時候，我得到祭司長的授權和准許，去大馬士革。

ccb.text: “那时，我带着祭司长的授权和委托去大马士革。

csbs.text: “那时我得到祭司长们的授权和委任往大马士革去。
